meaning: adj.超人的,属于神仙的n.超人
examples: People were beginning to attribute superhuman qualities to him.
"These astronauts could be regarded as superhuman beings, " Shi Bingbing said.
Officers were terrified of his superhuman strength.
But not least among his more amazing powers has been a superhuman charisma and ever-enduring appeal.
The Turbo delivers superhuman power to anyone who rides it: it's you only faster.
